school.name: Pardes Day School
school.tagline: The Pardes Way. Discover the Difference.
school.heroLine: The school you wish you had growing up.

pillars: Built for Life, Not Just School
differentiators: Multiple teachers working simultaneously in every classroom
JSAT standards through COJDS with targeted data tracking
Proprietary English curriculum developed by our founder
Judaic and General Studies skills in the morning, integrated content in the afternoon
Practice time built into the school day with trained teacher guidance
Dedicated real-life skills classes: collaboration, emotional intelligence, and more
Practical Jewish living in a Chabad-inspired way
A love for Israel woven into the student experience
